title: DHeLlam: General-Purpose, Automatic Micro-Batch Co-Execution for Distributed LLM Training
summary: ICCD 2025 Best Paper. This paper presents DHeLlam, a system for automatic micro-batch co-execution in distributed LLM training.
abstract: According to public conference and university news sources, DHeLlam targets communication bottlenecks in distributed LLM training and introduces automatic micro-batch co-execution to improve overall training efficiency.

content.title: Abstract
content.text: According to public conference and university news sources, DHeLlam targets communication bottlenecks in distributed LLM training and introduces automatic micro-batch co-execution to improve overall training efficiency.
